title: • Rewards students for behaviors beyond strict academic work.
content:
• Rewards students for behaviors beyond strict academic work.

📜 5. Zero XP Path – “The Stoic Scholar”

📜 Students who never engage with XP but still achieve top grades get a unique status.

✔ If a student never spends XP, never participates in challenges, never plays the “game,” but ranks in the top 5% of grades, they are awarded “The Stoic Scholar” title.

Special Recognition for Stoic Scholars
• Their final essay is published in a special “Hall of Fame” document in the class.
• They are granted a unique end-of-semester reflection session to discuss their learning experience in a one-on-one with the professor.
• They receive a special, unseen reward at the end of the course (to be determined).

✅ Why This Works:
• Allows for both gamified and traditional student engagement paths.
• Ensures that quiet, academically-focused students still get recognition.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 160 (chunk 160/555)
